text: A lone giraffe standing in the middle of a field with a mountain range behind it.
A wooden spoon stirs vegetables cooking in a pan.
Snow covered mountains with people going skiing
A blue bird that is sitting on some barbed wire.
A cat in a sink looking at another cat on a bathtub

A small toy dog set beside a toy cell phone.
A red pipe sticking up from the ground with a red brick building in the background.
A person standing in front of a display of surf boards.
